text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I have come to watch the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I actually get to run with you, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Don't get too excited, Kita. You might end up
stumbling out of the gate.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Some of the runners were invited from overseas.
There are a lot of unknown variables today...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But no matter who I'm up against, the mighty Teio
is gonna crush 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You won't find crushing me that easy! I'll be the
one taking you down!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm glad to see Kita's really fired up today!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Go, Kitasan! You've got what it takes to surpass
your idol!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Overthrow the Monarch! We know you can do it,
Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Tokai Teio! Show them the grandeur of
the Monarch!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the support from the crowd is around
a fifty-fifty split...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them have extremely passionate fans.
This is shaping up to be one of the most exciting
Japan Cups to date.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Do your best out there, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's Tokai Teio! She's rapidly gaining ground
from the rear! She's right on Kitasan Black's tail!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What?! Already?! Teio normally hangs back for
longer than this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio boldly takes the battle directly to
Kitasan Black, sticking closely behind her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a strategy that we've not often seen from
Tokai Teio before.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaghhh!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita's responding to Teio's challenge... No, wait!
What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the pressure, Kitasan Black increases her
speed for a time, but she gradually slows back
down to her initial pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fierce back-and-forth battle unfolds between
Tokai Teio and Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Both Kita and Teio have the advantage of having
raced in the Japan Cup before...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They're not running their own races—they're
taking the fight to each other!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...What would I do in that situation?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Satono Diamond fixedly watches the race, she
starts to picture how she would approach it.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Tokai Teio! Will Kitasan Black hold
on for the win, or will Tokai Teio pass her?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That really threw me off! I never imagined you'd
run so aggressively...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? I wouldn't have had
any chance at all if I stuck to a defensive
strategy.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll never lose that urge to take on a challenge. It's
all so I can continue to reach greater heights!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna bring the fight to you and
Dia in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You better be ready for me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Her desire for a challenge... That's what being an
illustrious racer means to Teio...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(McQueen valiantly accepts challenges from
others, while Teio embodies the role of a fierce
challenger.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (So what about me?)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I won a G1 race for the Satono family... I
overcame the jinx and seized victory.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I chased after Kita and raced against her in the
Twinkle Series.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I've got it!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long silence, Satono Diamond begins to
speak with a determined look on her face.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'd like to continue taking on new challenges.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I've challenged myself with various goals
time and again to get this far. Breaking the jinx
holding back the Satono family... Chasing after
Kita...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's why I think being the kind of illustrious
runner who takes on all kinds of challenges is the
best path for me to take.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Challenging McQueen and Teio was my first step
towards that path—the first new page of my
contribution to the annals of the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By facing all kinds of challenges, I want to carve
out a place for myself in the history of both the
Satono family and the world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Which brings me to say—my desire to compete
overseas has been rekindled.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm not doing it to prove it's possible. It's simply
what I want to do.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to win an overseas race and etch the
Satono family name into Umamusume history.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By doing so, I hope to break new ground for both
my family and for all the Umamusume racing in
Japan.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I think that is how I can contribute to the world of Umamusume.
choice_data_list: It looks like you've found your answer.
It looks like you've found your answer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I have!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the kind of illustrious racer that I wish to
be. I know what I need to strive for now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
First up—I'm going to win the Arima Kinen and
join the ranks of the most illustrious racers!
